full_description: Habit Tracker is an app that helps users monitor and maintain their daily habits. It allows users to set reminders and track their progress over time. With Habit Tracker, you can set goals for yourself and work towards achieving them. The app provides a simple and intuitive interface to help you stay on track. You can add habits, set reminders, and view your progress in a convenient calendar view. Habit Tracker also allows you to customize your habits and set specific goals for each one. Whether you want to exercise more, read more, or eat healthier, Habit Tracker is the perfect tool to help you achieve your goals.
